```prompt
---
agent: agent
description: "Configure service mesh for microservice communication"
---
# Service Mesh
## Task
Configure service mesh for microservice communication.
## Requirements
1. Install sidecar proxy (Istio, Linkerd). 2. Configure mTLS between services.
3. Set up traffic management (retries, timeouts, circuit breaking). 4. Implement observability (metrics, traces).
5. Define traffic policies.
## Constraints
- Minimal latency overhead. Auto-inject sidecars. Monitor mesh health.
## Success Criteria
- mTLS between all services. Traffic managed. Observability complete. Low overhead.
```
